languages.text: "Меня волнует безопасность Заркова, так что пусть исследователей возглавит Тау-Фи-0098".
"I am concerned about Zarkov's safety, so Tau-Phi-0098 should lead the researchers."
languages.original_text: "Меня волнует безопасность Заркова, так что пусть исследователей возглавит Тау-Фи-0098".

traits.locale_text: "I am concerned about Zarkov's safety, so Tau-Phi-0098 should lead the researchers."
"I am concerned about Zarkov's safety, so Tau-Phi-0098 should lead the researchers."
"I am concerned about Zarkov's safety, so Tau-Phi-0098 should lead the researchers."

languages.text: 「マゴス・タウ・フィ・0098。ザルコフの安全が心配なので、研究員を率いてほしい」
languages.original_text: "I am concerned about Zarkov's safety, so Tau-Phi-0098 should lead the researchers."

traits.locale_text: 「ザルコフの安全が心配なので、研究員を率いてほしい」

languages.text: «Me preocupa la seguridad de Zarkov, de modo que Tau-Fi-0098 debería liderar a los investigadores».
languages.original_text: "I am concerned about Zarkov's safety, so Tau-Phi-0098 should lead the researchers."

traits.locale_text: «Me preocupa la seguridad de Zarkov, de modo que Tau-Fi-0098 debería liderar a los investigadores».

languages.text: “我更忧心扎尔科夫的安全。应由陶-斐-0098领导研究团队。”
languages.original_text: "I am concerned about Zarkov's safety, so Tau-Phi-0098 should lead the researchers."

traits.locale_text: “我更忧心扎尔科夫的安全。应由陶-斐-0098领导研究团队。”

languages.text: "Ich sorge mich um Zarkovs Sicherheit. Deshalb sollte Tau-Phi-0098 die Forscher anführen."
languages.original_text: "I am concerned about Zarkov's safety, so Tau-Phi-0098 should lead the researchers."

traits.locale_text: "Ich sorge mich um Zarkovs Sicherheit. Deshalb sollte Tau-Phi-0098 die Forscher anführen."

languages.text: "Zarkov'un güvenliğinden endişeliyim. Bu yüzden araştırmacılara Tau-Fi-0098 liderlik etmeli."
languages.original_text: "I am concerned about Zarkov's safety, so Tau-Phi-0098 should lead the researchers."

traits.locale_text: "Zarkov'un güvenliğinden endişeliyim. Bu yüzden araştırmacılara Tau-Fi-0098 liderlik etmeli."

languages.text: « Je m'inquiète pour la sécurité de Zarkov. Tau-Phi-0098 devrait prendre la tête des chercheurs. »
languages.original_text: "I am concerned about Zarkov's safety, so Tau-Phi-0098 should lead the researchers."

traits.locale_text: « Je m'inquiète pour la sécurité de Zarkov. Tau-Phi-0098 devrait prendre la tête des chercheurs. »
